questions.sentence: The exclusion zone ______ one of Europe’s most unusual wildlife sanctuaries.
questions.explanation: Present perfect describes a change that started in the past and is relevant now.

questions.sentence: The area has become an unintended experiment ______.
questions.explanation: The collocation is an experiment in something.

questions.sentence: The ecological story of Chernobyl is ______.
questions.explanation: This phrase introduces a balanced argument.
